products.name: LUXEGLOW Lightning Body Cream
products.description: A rich body cream formulated with Niacinamide, Vitamin E, Aloe Vera, and Shea Butter to brighten, deeply moisturize, and smooth skin for a radiant, even-toned complexion. Dermatologically tested and suitable for all skin types, it promises visible results in just days. Available in 500ml and 1000ml sizes.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Lightning Body Lotion
products.description: A lightweight body lotion designed to brighten, smooth, and even out skin tone. Enriched with Niacinamide, Vitamin E, Aloe Vera, and Shea Butter, it provides deep moisturization and is suitable for all skin types, offering visible results in days.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Lightning Face Serum
products.description: A lightweight, fast-absorbing face serum formulated with Niacinamide and Vitamin C to brighten skin tone, nourish, and promote an even, radiant complexion. Enriched with Hyaluronic Acid and Aloe Vera, it provides deep hydration and is dermatologically tested for all skin types.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Lightning Soap
products.description: A gentle yet effective cleansing bar enriched with Niacinamide, Vitamin C, Aloe Vera, and Shea Butter. It deeply cleanses and purifies the skin while helping to reduce dullness, nourish, and promote a brighter, more even-toned complexion.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Argan Oil Shampoo
products.description: A nourishing shampoo enriched with 100% Pure Argan Oil, Biotin, Keratin, and Vitamin E. It is formulated to strengthen hair from root to tip, reduce hair fall, and nourish the scalp for healthier, stronger hair. The gentle, sulfate-free and paraben-free formula is suitable for all hair types.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Argan Oil Conditioner
products.description: A deeply nourishing conditioner enriched with 100% Pure Argan Oil, Biotin, Keratin, and Vitamin E. It conditions and hydrates dry, damaged hair, strengthens roots, adds shine and softness, and helps reduce hair fall. Its gentle formula is free from sulfates and parabens.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Glycerin Body Lotion
products.description: A deeply hydrating body lotion formulated with Pure Glycerin, Vitamin E, Aloe Vera, and Shea Butter. It provides intense, long-lasting moisture, softens and smoothens skin, and helps protect the skin barrier. Its non-greasy, fast-absorbing formula is suitable for all skin types.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Face Cream
products.description: A nourishing face cream designed for soft, smooth, and radiant skin. Enriched with Niacinamide, Vitamin E, and Aloe Vera, it provides deep hydration, helps even skin tone, and improves skin texture. Dermatologically tested and suitable for all skin types.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Face Wash
products.description: A deep-cleansing face wash formulated with Vitamin C and Niacinamide. It effectively clears impurities, brightens the skin, and is gentle enough for all skin types, helping to refresh, renew, and reveal a natural glow.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Hydrating & Glow Sheet Mask
products.description: A sheet mask infused with Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide, Aloe Vera Extract, Collagen, and Vitamin E. It is designed to deeply moisturize and nourish the skin, brighten skin tone, enhance natural glow and radiance, and soothe sensitive skin.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Lightning Sheet Mask
products.description: A brightening and revitalizing sheet mask formulated for bright, smooth, and radiant skin. Enriched with Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide, Aloe Vera Extract, Collagen, and Vitamin E, it provides intense hydration and helps even skin texture.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Lightning Sheet Mask - Ice Cooling
products.description: A cooling and soothing sheet mask infused with Menthol and Hyaluronic Acid to refresh and revitalize the skin. It helps reduce puffiness, calm tired skin, and minimize pores while providing deep hydration.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Lightning Sheet Mask - Tomato Extract
products.description: A brightening sheet mask infused with Tomato Extract and Hyaluronic Acid. It is designed to brighten skin tone, provide deep hydration, and offer antioxidant protection against free radicals for a smooth and glowing complexion.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Lightning Sheet Mask - Aloe Vera Extract
products.description: A soothing and hydrating sheet mask enriched with Aloe Vera Extract and Hyaluronic Acid. It provides intense moisture and hydration, ideal for calming and soothing the skin.

products.name: LUXEGLOW Lightning Sheet Mask - Honey Extract
products.description: A nourishing sheet mask formulated with Honey Extract and Hyaluronic Acid. It nourishes deeply with natural nutrients, brightens dull skin, and locks in moisture for long-lasting hydration, leaving skin soft and smooth.
